name: Spicy Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 cloves garlic, pressed (or more, if you love garlic)
1 can (10 oz) Ro-Tel tomatoes and chilies
2 bay leaves (I used fresh, but dried would also work)
NOTE: I froze the tofu first, then thawed it, squeezed it dry, and crumbled it into the sauce.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in 1/2 cup red wine over high heat until the wine has evaporated (do not let it get too dry or it will burn).
2. Add tomatoes, another 1/2 cup red wine, oregano, basil, rosemary, and sugar. Stir together and reduce heat to medium. Taste and adjust seasonings.
3. Bring to a boil. The sauce should be pretty soupy; add TVP (do not pre-soak). Cover and reduce heat to a simmer.
4. Let cook for about 10 minutes, or until the TVP has become soft. Add crumbled tofu and heat through.
5. Serve!
